seoTitle: Lakeside vs Lamb Island — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lakeside and Lamb Island. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lakeside vs Lamb Island: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lakeside and Lamb Island.
heading: Lakeside vs Lamb Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lakeside, Queensland and Lamb Island, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lakeside has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Lamb Island (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lakeside or Lamb Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lakeside has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Lamb Island scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lakeside scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Lamb Island scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lakeside or Lamb Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lakeside has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
